name: fengshui-master-external-calculation-contracts
purpose: Machine-readable contracts for safely extending FengShui Master with external engines or user-supplied trusted sources for advanced systems that are intentionally not calculated inside this repository.

systems.title: Full bazi / four pillars natal chart
required_inputs: sex or lineage convention if used
li chun or lunar-year boundary convention
required_outputs: ten gods or relationship labels if used
red_lines: do not make deterministic fate claims
do not predict health death wealth marriage or disaster
systems.fallback_without_engine: Stay at year-level ganzhi or broad life-omen symbolism, clearly stating that complete four-pillar calculation is not available.

systems.title: Zi Wei Dou Shu natal chart
red_lines: do not use zi wei to issue deterministic life predictions
systems.fallback_without_engine: Explain that Zi Wei charting is outside built-in scope and offer broad symbolic or intake-level guidance only.

systems.title: Qi Men Dun Jia chart or divination plate
allowed_use: interpret a supplied chart with caveats
ask for source data before precise claims
red_lines: do not invent a qi men plate
do not use qi men to guarantee outcomes
do not advise illegal unsafe or coercive action
systems.fallback_without_engine: Provide a method checklist and broad timing or strategy symbolism, not a Qi Men chart.

systems.title: Da Liu Ren chart
required_outputs: heaven and earth plates if used
allowed_use: interpret a trusted supplied chart cautiously
separate chart construction from symbolic reading
red_lines: do not invent transmissions or lessons
do not replace legal medical safety or financial judgment
systems.fallback_without_engine: State that Liu Ren charting is outside built-in scope and keep the answer at intake, boundary, or broad symbolic level.

systems.title: Tong shu / almanac-backed date selection
required_inputs: people involved when personal clashes matter
red_lines: do not invent tong shu attributes
do not tell users to ignore legal safety medical or financial deadlines
systems.fallback_without_engine: Use only built-in moon phase, solar term, annual caution, and event-fit symbolism, clearly stating that this is not full almanac date selection.

systems.title: Precision astronomy and calendar conversion
allowed_use: supply exact moments to timing analysis
compare approximate built-in helpers with exact external data
red_lines: do not present approximate helper output as precision astronomy
systems.fallback_without_engine: Use the built-in approximate moon phase or solar term helpers only as symbolic context and disclose the precision limit.
